Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Drinking Chagall Café's signature Pheromone Coffee will raise {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}If you're looking for some extra cash, you can pick up a part-time job here on {f 0 1 2}Monday, Tuesday, and Wednesday nights{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Time will pass when you visit the café, whether it's as a customer or an employee.[n]{f 1 1}
